channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jackie Shroff Stars in Hindi Sci-Fi Film ‘The Great Grand Superhero’ Featuring His Grandson
item.description: Veteran actor Jackie Shroff is all set to charm audiences once again in the upcoming Hindi film ‘The Great Grand Superhero’. The movie, directed by Manish Saini, features an interesting storyline wher...

item.title: Sixth victim recovered as rescue operations continue at collapsed Pampanga building in Angeles City
item.description: Rescue teams in Angeles City, Pampanga continued their search and retrieval operations after a building collapse incident that has already claimed multiple lives. Authorities confirmed that responders...

item.title: Supreme Court clarifies Batson jury selection standards in Mississippi racial bias case
item.description: The article discusses a Supreme Court decision in the case of Pitchford v. Cain, where Justice Brett Kavanaugh wrote the 5-4 majority opinion addressing racial bias in jury selection. The case arose f...

item.title: Retired federal judge criticizes Trump's anti-weaponization fund for alleged Jan. 6-related claims
item.description: A CNN segment featured retired U.S. District Judge Shira Scheindlin of the Southern District of New York sharply criticizing a proposed Trump-backed initiative known as the “anti-weaponization fund,” ...

item.title: Ratings Drop Sharply as CBS Replaces Stephen Colbert with Byron Allen Show
item.description: Stephen Colbert's long-running late-night program ended with a series finale that attracted 6.7 million viewers. His replacement on CBS, Byron Allen's 'Comics Unleashed,' premiered to just 995,000 vie...

item.title: Uncertainty remains over a potential second season of Spider-Noir following its Prime Video debut
item.description: Sony’s Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse universe has expanded into television with the release of ‘Spider-Noir’, a new spin-off series now available on Amazon Prime Video. The show premiered on 27 Ma...

item.title: Canada considers suspension of over 24,000 immigration documents under Ebola-related border restrictions
item.description: Canadian federal authorities are considering the suspension of more than 24,000 immigration documents as part of precautionary border measures linked to Ebola-affected regions. The policy discussion c...

item.title: Report raises concerns over nonprofit supporting Trump's anti-fraud agenda amid leadership misconduct allegations
item.description: A new investigative report highlights concerns about a nonprofit organization supporting President Donald Trump’s “war on fraud,” alleging that some of its top leaders have faced serious accusations o...

item.title: Pinelands High School Jazz Band Achieves Second Place at Band Slam Finals
item.description: The Pinelands High School Jazz Band delivered an outstanding performance at the Band Slam Finals, held on Friday, 15 May, at the amphitheatre at the V & A Waterfront. Competing against high school ban...

item.title: Expert warns Trump’s Middle East peace plan could worsen regional conflict
item.description: A Middle East affairs expert, Malcolm Nance, has criticized President Donald Trump's latest strategy to expand the Abraham Accords as a response to the ongoing conflict in Iran. Nance described the pl...

item.title: Criticism grows after Fox News host comments on proposal affecting airport operations in major U.S. cities
item.description: A commentary segment involving Fox News host Harris Faulkner sparked widespread backlash after she appeared to support a controversial proposal linked to U.S. Department of Homeland Security policy di...

item.title: Genetic Study Identifies Extinct Seychelles Crocodiles as Isolated Saltwater Crocodile Population
item.description: Scientists have resolved a long-standing mystery surrounding the crocodiles that once lived in the Seychelles Islands. Historical accounts from early European explorers described crocodiles as common ...

item.title: India’s Gen Z ‘Cockroach Janta Party’ reflects youth discontent but struggles to move beyond social media activism
item.description: The article explores the rapid rise of India’s Gen Z-driven online movement known as the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP), founded by 30-year-old Abhijeet Dipke. What began as a satirical response to remar...

item.title: Authorities say suspect killed Caltech astrophysicist after domestic dispute and prior firearm incidents
item.description: Authorities in Los Angeles County allege that Freddy Snyder fatally shot Caltech astrophysicist Carl Grillmair in Antelope Valley after a series of escalating events that began with a domestic dispute...

item.title: Alberta government confirms referendum question and October 19 vote on separation proposal
item.description: The Government of Alberta has officially confirmed the wording and structure of a referendum question related to provincial separation, setting the vote for October 19. The decision was made through a...

item.title: Marcus expresses concern over Jalil and Datu Rahman’s safety in Blood vs Duty Episode 39
item.description: The article refers to Episode 39 of the television drama series 'Blood vs Duty,' aired under ABS-CBN Entertainment. In this episode, the focus is on the character Marcus, who becomes increasingly worr...

item.title: Asana acquires Stack AI to expand AI-driven workflow platform
item.description: Asana has announced the acquisition of Stack AI, a startup specializing in no-code AI agent and workflow automation tools, for approximately $75 million. The deal represents a strategic step in Asana’...

item.title: Silversands High School Learners Struggle Amid Prolonged Power Outage
item.description: Learners at Silversands High School in Kuils River are facing significant challenges due to an ongoing electricity outage that has lasted for several weeks. In a bid to get attention, the learners too...

item.title: Conspiracy Theories Hamper Ebola Response in Democratic Republic of Congo
item.description: As the Ebola outbreak intensifies in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo, misinformation and conspiracy theories are creating significant challenges for public health efforts. Some local residents be...

item.title: How Nigerian Content Creator Olakliz Grew From 20 Views to Global Digital Recognition
item.description: The story of Olamide Adeniran, popularly known as Olakliz, is one of steady growth, patience, and smart repositioning in the digital content space. Born in Ibadan on 4 October 1999, he started his jou...
